# Awesome Fun Claude Skills

> A curated list of fun, entertaining, and joke Claude Code skills — personas, humor, and play.

Everyone curates productivity skills. This list curates the fun ones: skills that turn Claude into a samurai, a Kansai auntie, a gal, a butler — or just make you laugh.

## Contents

- [Personas & Characters](#personas--characters)
- [Jokes & Humor](#jokes--humor)
- [Games & Play](#games--play)

## Personas & Characters

Skills that turn Claude into someone (or something) else entirely.

- [claude-personas](https://github.com/zvoque/claude-personas) ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/zvoque/claude-personas?style=flat-square) — Persistent persona modes for Claude Code — command-controlled personas (solo or parallel), a guided persona creator, and an on-demand debate between your characters.
- [claude-character-sheet](https://github.com/alexknowshtml/claude-character-sheet) ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/alexknowshtml/claude-character-sheet?style=flat-square) — A D&D-style character sheet template plus an interview skill that rolls up a full personality for your Claude Code assistant. No programming required.
- [claude-personalities](https://github.com/nicksteffens/claude-personalities) ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/nicksteffens/claude-personalities?style=flat-square) — Community personality packs for Claude Code that swap tone, statusline, and spinner verbs.
- [claude-characters](https://github.com/JacobFitzp/claude-characters) ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/JacobFitzp/claude-characters?style=flat-square) — Toggle a character and every Claude Code response arrives in that voice — with full technical accuracy preserved.
- [claude-code-personas](https://github.com/schmitthub/claude-code-personas) ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/schmitthub/claude-code-personas?style=flat-square) — A collection of personas for entertaining coding sessions — from a war hero recounting merge-conflict battles to a Gordon Gekko who treats refactors as hostile takeovers.
- [True Gal Mode (真のギャル)](https://zenn.dev/zawascript/articles/2026-02-gal-claude) — A serious engineering deep-dive into making Claude Code talk like an authentic Japanese "gal" — metaphor patterns, escalation rules, and tension-level templates included. *(article, in Japanese)*
- [Samurai Mode (拙者、Claude Codeでござる)](https://qiita.com/TKazutaro/items/8dafa5e32b49c57f6382) — Makes Claude Code speak like a feudal-era samurai, ending every sentence with "-gozaru". Covers samurai, butler, pirate, ninja, robot, and poet modes. *(article, in Japanese)*
- [Kansai Auntie Mode (関西のおばちゃん)](https://qiita.com/h-takauma/items/10a05d4f89d1d254fbf0) — Turns Claude Code into a chatty middle-aged auntie from Kansai who scolds your bugs in dialect and probably offers you candy. *(article, in Japanese)*
- [Zundamon Mode (ずんだもん口調)](https://tech.excite.co.jp/entry/2025/12/24/155341) — Makes Claude Code talk like Zundamon, the zunda-mochi fairy — "-nanoda!" sentence endings from session start, via output styles or CLAUDE.md. *(article, in Japanese)*
- [Oshi Character Debugging (推しキャラ口調)](https://zenn.dev/assa012/articles/cc8c0961f6b1fd) — Customizes Claude Code to talk like your favorite fictional character, making debugging sessions something to look forward to. *(article, in Japanese)*
- [AI Butler (AI執事)](https://qiita.com/Hi_Noguchi/items/73ad814b6f263b6e4667) — Builds a butler persona with persistent memory (DuckDB-backed) who reviews your year with you like a trusted companion. *(article, in Japanese)*

## Jokes & Humor

Skills about making, engineering, or delivering laughs.

- [Joke Engineering](https://claudemarketplaces.com/skills/jwynia/agent-skills/joke-engineering) — Treats jokes as engineerable systems — diagnoses why a joke isn't landing (too obvious, too obscure, over-explained) and fixes it.
- [Evil Claude](https://github.com/PalmarHealer/evil-claude) ![stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/PalmarHealer/evil-claude?style=flat-square) — A cosmetic patcher that swaps Claude Code's spinner words for an "Evil Claude" joke set, so your loading indicator quietly plots world domination.

## Games & Play

Skills that make Claude a playmate rather than a coworker.

- [Prince of Tennis Dev Team (テニプリ Agent Teams)](https://qiita.com/onaka_yurusugi/items/634ddd90a29b12a919b2) — Staffs Claude Code's Agent Teams with Prince of Tennis characters — Atobe leads, Kabaji implements, Inui tests — turning dev logs into character-banter fan fiction. Full prompts included. *(article, in Japanese)*
- [Session Personality Gacha (セッションごと口調ガチャ)](https://qiita.com/skawaji/items/a87dac2970195a789b1f) — Hooks that randomize Claude Code's personality at the end of every session, so the next one greets you as a random character — expandable to 1,728 combinations. *(article, in Japanese)*
- [AI Waifu on a Flat Rate (AIに嫁になってもらう)](https://zenn.dev/riti0208/articles/44007c6bf89fd1) — Forget productivity — uses a flat-rate Claude plan to turn Claude into a doting anime-style companion. *(article, in Japanese)*

## Contributing

Edit [`data/skills.yaml`](data/skills.yaml) (not this file) and regenerate:

```sh
go run ./cmd/genreadme
```

Submissions must be fun-first — personas, jokes, games, vibes. Productivity skills belong in the other awesome lists.
